chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 109 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.452/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.453/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 30.01.2024 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Phulpoto, Advocate for petitioners..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Learned Counsel, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
